summary: Frontend-only marketing site for LPS Beauty Salon tested end-to-end on desktop (1440x900) and mobile (390x844). All 13 requested checks passed. No console errors, no broken images, no missing data-testids.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and well-structured. Components are small and focused. data-testid coverage is excellent across all interactive/informational elements.
Minor: One failed network request observed for `/cdn-cgi/rum` (Cloudflare RUM beacon) — unrelated to app code, can be ignored.
Footer Instagram link points to https://www.instagram.com/ (root) — consider adding an actual handle if/when available; not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested checks pass. Verified: hero headline 'Your beauty, our passion.', sticky navbar with all 6 anchors (#about/#services/#why/#reviews/#gallery/#contact), 5 tel: links all = tel:+919900914999, WhatsApp float -> wa.me/919900914999, 5 service tabs (hair/skin/nails/waxing/bridal) each render panel + items, Google Maps iframe present with correct embed URL, Today badge highlighted in opening hours, footer (name/address/call/wa/hours), mobile hamburger opens/closes mobile-menu drawer below lg viewport, all 9 images load (naturalWidth>0), zero console errors.
